metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for i-know-kungfu — an epistemically honest, self-improving coding layer that grounds, verifies, and learns instead of pretending to know.

plugins.name: i-know-kungfu
plugins.description: Write correctly in languages Claude does not know — without faking it. Grounds every symbol in fetched docs or verified compilation, runs all generated code in a Docker sandbox, and learns each mistake as a misconception -> correct-model lesson recalled next time. Ships an MCP server, a self-improving per-language knowledge base, and a held-out benchmark that measures its own learning curve.
